title: Indulgent Polish Vanilla Pod Pudding
description: A rich, smoky, and velvety Polish dessert featuring vanilla pod and kombu-cold-extract.
instructions: Combine the heavy cream, vanilla pod, and kombu powder in a saucepan and heat over medium heat until the sugar has dissolved.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
Temper the egg yolk mixture by slowly pouring the hot cream mixture into the egg yolks, whisking constantly.
Add the butter, vanilla extract, and smoked salt to the saucepan and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into individual ramekins or a large baking dish and place in a water bath.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Cover the pudding with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of smoked salt and a drizzle of kombu-cold-extract.
Note: Kombu-cold-extract can be made by steeping kombu in water and straining the liquid before using.
